Uses of Class
com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.Part.PartBuilder

  • Packages that use Part.PartBuilder 
    Package Description
    com.enovka.gemini4j.domain
    Provides domain classes representing objects of the Gemini API.

    • Uses of Part.PartBuilder in com.enovka.gemini4j.domain

      Methods in com.enovka.gemini4j.domain that return Part.PartBuilder 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      static Part.PartBuilder Part.builder()  
      Part.PartBuilder Part.toBuilder()  
      Part.PartBuilder Part.PartBuilder.withFileData​(FileData fileData)
      URI based data.
      Part.PartBuilder Part.PartBuilder.withFunctionCall​(FunctionCall functionCall)
      A predicted FunctionCall returned from the model that contains a string representing the FunctionDeclaration.name with the arguments and their values.
      Part.PartBuilder Part.PartBuilder.withFunctionResponse​(FunctionResponse functionResponse)
      The result output of a FunctionCall that contains a string representing the FunctionDeclaration.name and a structured JSON object containing any output from the function is used as context to the model.
      Part.PartBuilder Part.PartBuilder.withInlineData​(Blob inlineData)
      Inline media bytes.
      Part.PartBuilder Part.PartBuilder.withText​(String text)
      Inline text.
